description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The front facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and two outdoor patio areas with seating, separated by a central entrance and a gated fence. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious deck with a swimming pool and sun loungers, emphasizing outdoor living. The structure is predominantly white with accents of gray and wood, and includes green lawn sections on both sides. The upper floor has multiple large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, front patios, and a rear pool deck. The design is sleek, white, and geometric with wood and green lawn accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing two patios with seating, a central entrance, large windows, and a gated fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered, boxy structure, green lawn, and partial view of the pool deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive pool deck, sun loungers, and upper-level windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the geometric form, green lawn, and rear pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on both floors
